title: WOS Studio (Authoring) — Migration Path
description: MigrationPath records the wosVersionPin claim string for a WorkflowIntent + tracks deprecation alerts + the chosen migration strategy when the parent stack ratifies a new minor stream version. Per studio/specs/compiler-contract.md SA-MUST-cmp-050-052 + change-impact.md `triggerKind = wos-version-deprecation`. Composes parent RELEASE-STREAMS.md + COMPATIBILITY-MATRIX.md versioning model.
$comment: Promotion status (Stage-3, 2026-05-01): MVP shape; deprecationAlerts[] surface from parent compatibility matrix at re-compile time.

x-lm.intent: Document type marker for the Studio MigrationPath

wosVersionPin.description: WOS version claim string per parent RELEASE-STREAMS.md. Comma-separated stream@version pairs.
examples: kernel@1.0, governance@1.0, ai@0.5, signature@1.0, custody@1.0, advanced@0.3, assurance@1.0

x-lm.intent: WOS substrate version pin — load-bearing for reproducibility and migration triggering

deprecationAlerts.description: Active deprecation alerts (from parent COMPATIBILITY-MATRIX.md re-resolution at compile time).

migrationStrategy.description: Chosen migration approach. `regenerate` = re-compile from current PolicyObjects against the new pin; `preserve` = keep at old pin until end-of-support; `manual-review` = reviewer walk-through required before re-pinning.
